category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Burkina Faso.

title.en: China-to-Burkina Faso EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入布基纳法索：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入布吉納法索：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Burkina Faso ABNORM / ARSE / SONABEL requirements, IEC 61851 safety and EMC standards, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector expectations, SONABEL grid-connection requirements, OCPP interoperability, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines. Honest context: Burkina Faso's EV market is extremely nascent, national electricity deficits and very low household electrification rates heavily constrain 4-wheel EV charging deployment, and 2/3-wheelers represent the more immediately relevant e-mobility segment.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与布基纳法索ABNORM / ARSE / SONABEL要求、IEC 61851安全及EMC标准、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口预期、SONABEL并网要求、OCPP互操作，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基线的差距对照。诚实背景：布基纳法索电动汽车市场极为初级，国家电力短缺和极低的家庭电气化率严重制约四轮电动汽车充电设施部署，两/三轮电动车是更为切实相关的电动出行细分市场。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與布吉納法索ABNORM / ARSE / SONABEL要求、IEC 61851安全及EMC標準、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口預期、SONABEL併網要求、OCPP互操作，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基線的差距對照。誠實背景：布吉納法索電動汽車市場極為初級，國家電力短缺和極低的家庭電氣化率嚴重制約四輪電動汽車充電設施部署，兩/三輪電動車是更為切實相關的電動出行細分市場。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Burkina Faso, the confirmed practical gaps are: connector incompatibility between GB/T 20234 and the IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 ecosystem that Burkina Faso follows as a Francophone IEC-aligned country; IEC 61851-1 and IEC 61851-23 safety evidence required in lieu of GB/T 18487 documentation; ABNORM conformity assessment coordination and ARSE regulatory approval for grid-connected installations; SONABEL grid-connection approval for the 220/380 V 50 Hz national grid, with severe electricity-deficit constraints that fundamentally limit 4-wheel fast-charging deployment; EMC evidence per IEC 61000 series; and high-ambient-temperature and dust derating for Sahel conditions (regularly exceeding 40 °C, heavy harmattan dust). Critically, Burkina Faso's 4-wheel EV market is extremely nascent — the primary e-mobility segment is 2/3-wheelers, and national electricity access remains very limited outside Ouagadougou. Any deployment project must engage SONABEL and ARSE early and budget for significant lead time on conformity assessment and grid-capacity review. As of 2026-06-14, a single published mandatory EVSE certification rule through ABNORM could not be confirmed; exporters must verify the current conformity route with ABNORM, ARSE, and local partners before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入布基纳法索时，已确认的实务差距包括：GB/T 20234与布基纳法索作为法语国家IEC体系国家所遵循的IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2体系之间的接口不兼容；须以IEC 61851-1和IEC 61851-23安全证据替代GB/T 18487文件；并网安装须经ABNORM合格评定协调和ARSE监管审批；220/380 V 50 Hz国家电网的SONABEL并网审批，且严重的电力短缺从根本上制约了四轮快速充电设施部署；须符合IEC 61000系列的EMC证据；以及针对萨赫勒气候条件（常超40°C、哈马丹沙尘严重）的高温和沙尘降额设计。关键背景：布基纳法索四轮电动汽车市场极为初级——主要电动出行细分市场为两/三轮电动车，且除瓦加杜古外全国电力普及率仍极低。任何部署项目都须尽早与SONABEL和ARSE接触，并为合格评定和电网容量审查预留充足交货期。截至2026年6月14日，未能确认ABNORM发布的适用于EVSE的单一强制认证规则；出口商在发货前须向ABNORM、ARSE及当地合作方核实当前合格评定路径。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入布吉納法索時，已確認的實務差距包括：GB/T 20234與布吉納法索作為法語國家IEC體系國家所遵循的IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2體系之間的接口不兼容；須以IEC 61851-1和IEC 61851-23安全證據替代GB/T 18487文件；併網安裝須經ABNORM合格評定協調和ARSE監管審批；220/380 V 50 Hz國家電網的SONABEL併網審批，且嚴重的電力短缺從根本上制約了四輪快速充電設施部署；須符合IEC 61000系列的EMC證據；以及針對薩赫勒氣候條件（常超40°C、哈馬丹沙塵嚴重）的高溫和沙塵降額設計。關鍵背景：布吉納法索四輪電動汽車市場極為初級——主要電動出行細分市場為兩/三輪電動車，且除瓦加杜古外全國電力普及率仍極低。任何部署項目都須盡早與SONABEL和ARSE接觸，並為合格評定和電網容量審查預留充足交貨期。截至2026年6月14日，未能確認ABNORM發布的適用於EVSE的單一強制認證規則；出口商在發貨前須向ABNORM、ARSE及當地合作方核實當前合格評定路徑。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, ABNORM scope determination, ARSE regulatory approval, SONABEL grid-connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, network operators, and installers should verify current Burkina Faso conformity assessment rules, ARSE and SONABEL requirements, IEC standard editions, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、ABNORM适用范围裁定、ARSE监管审批、SONABEL并网审批、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、网络运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行布基纳法索合格评定规则、ARSE和SONABEL要求、IEC标准版本及安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、ABNORM適用範圍裁定、ARSE監管審批、SONABEL併網審批、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、網絡運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行布吉納法索合格評定規則、ARSE和SONABEL要求、IEC標準版本及安裝規則。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
